steps.title: Explanation of complex parameters below
steps.instruction: Explanation of complex parameters below: * **P20-Multi Mount**: Select which mount the P20-Multi Pipette is attached to. * **Number of Destination Plates**: Select the number of destination plates. * **Destination plate PBS volume (µl)**: Specify the volume of PBS to transfer to Destination plate (step 1). * **Destination plate 66% DMSO volume (µl)**: Specify the volume of 66% DMSO to transfer to Destination plate (step 2). * **Source plate volume for dilution (µl)**: Specify the volume for first dilution transfer (step 3). * **Destination plate volume for dilution (µl)**: Specify the volume for second dilution transfer (step 5). * **Library aliquot volume (µl)**: Specify the volume for the library aliquot (step 7). ---

steps.title: Destination plate, P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2)
steps.instruction: Destination plate, P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2): Add **Destination plate PBS volume** of PBS (NEST 12-Well Reservoir, 15mL, Row 2) into columns 1-4 rows A-H, column 5 rows A-E (will access new tips for last transfer).

steps.title: Destination plate, P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2)
steps.instruction: Destination plate, P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2): Add **Destination plate 66% DMSO volume** of 66% DMSO (NEST 12-Well Reservoir, 15mL, Row 1) into columns 6-9 rows A-H, column 10 rows A-E (will access new tips for last transfer).

steps.title: Source plate, P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2)
steps.instruction: Source plate, P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2): Take **Source plate volume for dilution** of column 1-4 rows A-H, column 5 rows A-E, and transfer into the destination plate in the same orientation (columns 1-4 rows A-H, column 5 rows A-E). Replace tips between columns.

steps.title: Destination plate, P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2)
steps.instruction: Destination plate, P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2): Mix columns 1-4, 5 rows A-E. pipette 20 µl up & down 4 times. Replace tips between columns.

steps.title: Destination plate, P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2)
steps.instruction: Destination plate, P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2): Take **Destination plate volume for dilution** of column 1-4 rows A-H, column 5 rows A-E, and transfer into column 6-9 rows A-H, column 10 rows A-E. Replace tips between columns.

steps.title: Destination plate, P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2)
steps.instruction: Destination plate, P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2): Mix columns 5-9, 10A-E. pipette 20 µl up & down 4 times. Replace tips between columns.

steps.title: Aliquot the library plate (columns 1-10,...
steps.instruction: Aliquot the library plate (columns 1-10, rows A-H) into 2-3 empty SPL 96-Well Cell Culture Plates: P20 8-Channel Pipette (GEN2).
